metaTitle: Word Counter — Free Word & Character Count (Real-time & Private)
metaDescription: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs instantly. Check social media limits for Twitter, Instagram, and TikTok. 100% private — your text never leaves your browser.
introSummary: Our professional Word Counter is a high-performance text analysis utility built for writers, students, social media managers, and SEO specialists. Whether you are drafting a viral X (Twitter) post, optimizing Google meta descriptions, or tracking your daily word count for a novel, our tool provides split-second accuracy. Designed with a 'Privacy-First' architecture, every character you type is processed locally in your browser, ensuring your creative drafts and sensitive documents are never uploaded to a server.

contextUsage.title: For Social Media Managers
contextUsage.desc: Ensure your captions and bios fit perfectly within the strict character limits of Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn using our visual progress bars.

contextUsage.title: For Content Writers & SEOs
contextUsage.desc: Optimize meta titles and descriptions to avoid truncation in Google search results, and calculate the estimated reading time for your blog posts.

contextUsage.title: For Students & Professionals
contextUsage.desc: Track your progress on essays, reports, and applications to meet specific word count requirements without compromising the privacy of your work.

howto.description: Simply type or paste your content into the editor. The counter analyzes your text in real-time as you make changes.
View live updates for Word Count, Character Count (with/without spaces), Sentences, and Paragraphs immediately below the text area.
Watch the integrated progress bars to see how close you are to reaching the maximum limits for various social media platforms.
Review the calculated reading time based on adult average speeds to understand how long it will take for your audience to consume your content.

why: Instant Real-Time Counting — No 'Submit' button needed. All stats update immediately as you type, delete, or paste text.
Comprehensive Platform Presets — Visual indicators for Twitter (X), Instagram Bio, TikTok, and Google Meta descriptions to prevent cut-offs.
Zero-Knowledge Privacy — Your text is processed entirely within your browser's sandbox. We have zero access to your data, drafts, or personal notes.
Advanced Text Metrics — Go beyond simple counting with sentence and paragraph detection, plus character counts both including and excluding spaces.
Reading Time Estimation — Helps you optimize blog posts and scripts by providing an estimated 'Time to Read' based on a standard 200 WPM rate.
Works 100% Offline — The logic is baked into your browser. Once the page is loaded, you can count words in airplane mode or high-security zones.

faq.q: Does this tool save my writing or drafts?
faq.a: No. This is a 'Serverless' utility. Your text is processed in your device's local RAM and is never sent to our servers. Your privacy is our priority.
Yes. Most social media platforms and SEO standards count spaces as characters. However, we provide both 'Total Characters' and 'Characters (No Spaces)' for your convenience.

faq.q: How accurate is the sentence and paragraph count?
faq.a: Our tool uses pattern recognition for punctuation (., !, ?) and line breaks. It is highly accurate for standard English prose and professional writing.

faq.q: Can I use this for my 10,000-word essay?
faq.a: Absolutely. There are no length limits. Since processing happens on your own CPU, even very long manuscripts are analyzed in milliseconds.

faq.q: Is the reading time accurate for everyone?
faq.a: It is an estimate based on the adult average of 200 words per minute. Actual reading speed may vary depending on the complexity of the text and the reader.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Instant analysis of unlimited text strings
Accurate counting for English, Korean, Emojis, and Symbols
Guarantees data sovereignty for sensitive documents
Up-to-date specs for X, Instagram, TikTok, and Google
Lag-free typing experience even for long-form content

troubleshooting: Numbers not updating? Ensure your browser's JavaScript is enabled. The tool requires local scripts to perform the counting logic.
Incorrect paragraph count? Make sure you are using 'Enter' for new paragraphs. Double line breaks are the standard trigger for a new paragraph count.
Special characters acting weird? Our tool is Unicode-compliant, but some legacy fonts may display emojis differently. The count will remain accurate regardless.
proTips: SEO Tip: Aim for 155 characters in your meta descriptions to ensure Google doesn't cut off your call-to-action in search results.
Social Media Tip: For X (Twitter), while the limit is 280, keeping your post under 240 characters often leads to higher engagement rates.
Writing Tip: If your average sentence length exceeds 25 words, consider breaking them up to improve the overall readability score for your audience.
